title: LongTermRefreshLlmOut
description:
Schema for the JSON object returned by `prompts/long_term_summary_prompt.md`. Mirrors `LongTermRefreshLlmOut` and `KnowledgeCandidateLlmOut` in `crates/clawd/src/memory/service.rs`, and is enforced by `long_term_summary_schema_drift` in the same file.

This prompt produces a durable summary plus up to a few conservative structured knowledge candidates. Runtime may still fall back to treating the whole output as plain summary text when the model does not return valid JSON, so the schema primarily guards the structured path rather than making summary refresh brittle.

knowledge_candidates.description: Optional candidate facts for long-term persistence. Runtime later applies additional conservative validation before writing them.
